backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no methods or state defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented performance and SEO features (font preconnect, lazy image loading, LCP preload, critical CSS inlining) with associated files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend file's purpose and key changes, covering performance optimizations, SEO metadata, component descriptions, and static public assets.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry point that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes, plus base border and background/text body styles.
frontend/index.html: SEO-optimized HTML entry point for VERDIER COUVERTURE with full meta/OG/Twitter/JSON-LD tags, Google Site Verification, canonical URL, hero image preload, non-blocking Google Fonts loading, and inlined critical CSS.
frontend/public/google2ea9c3e7d5d4abde.h: Static Google Search Console ownership verification file containing the site verification meta tag and required body text.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all crawlers and pointing to the absolute sitemap URL for the production domain.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap with a single entry for the canonical root URL, last modified 2025-07-17, with monthly change frequency and priority 1.0.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the full single-page landing site by composing Navigation, Hero, Services, About, Testimonials, Contact, ServiceAreas, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Two-column about section describing VERDIER COUVERTURE's history, values, and certifications, with the quality icon image using lazy loading and decoding async.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a validated devis request form, phone/email/address info cards, zone d'intervention badge, and a success state after submission — all in French.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, contact details (phone/email/address), service links, navigation links, and a copyright bar for Verdier Couverture.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, headline, geo-targeted subheadline, key highlights, and CTA buttons linking to contact and services sections.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, a phone CTA, and a responsive hamburger menu that changes background on scroll.
frontend/src/components/ServiceAreas.tsx: SEO-focused section listing ~40 Val-d'Oise cities served and 12 service keywords as tag clouds to highlight Verdier Couverture's geographic coverage.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Displays a grid of six roofing services (réfection, pose, réparation, isolation, zinguerie, traitement) each with an image, description, and feature list.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a testimonials section with six hardcoded French customer reviews for VERDIER COUVERTURE, displaying star ratings, service type, date, and reviewer initials in a grid layout.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining a warm earthy OKLCH color palette (terracotta, slate, cream), typography rules using Playfair Display and Inter, and reusable component utility classes for the roofing site theme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH brand colors (terracotta, slate, offwhite), serif/sans font families, box shadows, border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 31) tracking the VERDIER COUVERTURE landing page features, known SEO/performance issues (missing structured data fields, sitemap errors, poor Core Web Vitals), and architectural notes about the static HTML/React setup.
